targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "cpu_load_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "memory_used_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "uptime_sec" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "conn_total" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "cpu_load_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "system" and r._field == "memory_used_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "connected" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.operator}))

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "signal_pct" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "rsrp" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "RSRP")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "rssi" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "RSSI")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "sinr" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "SINR")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "rx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "LTE RX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lte" and r._field == "tx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "LTE TX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wireguard" and r._field == "rx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "WG RX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wireguard" and r._field == "tx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0}))
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "WG TX")

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_summary" and r._field == "active_devices" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_summary" and r._field == "active_devices" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max)

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_host" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["router", "mac", "hostname"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["router", "hostname", "mac", "rx_bytes", "tx_bytes"])

panels.title: Unique devices (7 days)
panels.description: Devices seen via DHCP or ARP in the last 7 days

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> keep(columns: ["mac"])
  |> distinct(column: "mac")
  |> count()

panels.title: All devices seen (7 days) — DHCP / ARP
panels.description: Every device that appeared on the network. Hostname from DHCP, IP from ARP. Gaps in State Timeline = offline.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "mac", "ip", "hostname", "source", "interface"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)

panels.title: New devices (first seen in last 7 days)
panels.description: Devices that appeared for the first time within the selected period

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> first()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "mac", "hostname", "ip"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)

panels.title: Device presence timeline (7 days)
panels.description: Green = device seen in that polling cycle. Gaps (grey) = device offline / not responding.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_seen" and r.source == "dhcp" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if exists r._value then r._value else 0}))

panels.title: Traffic per device — weekly (hotspot clients)
panels.description: Cumulative rx/tx counter rate per device. derivative() shows speed; sum gives weekly total.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_host" and r._field == "rx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "⬇ " + r.hostname}))

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "hotspot_host" and r._field == "tx_bytes" and r.router =~ /^${router:regex}$/)
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * -1.0, _field: "⬆ " + r.hostname}))

panels.title: Онлайн сейчас
panels.description: Количество станций отвечающих на ping прямо сейчас

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_ping" and r._field == "up")
  |> last()
  |> sum()

panels.title: Статус станций
panels.description: Ping-статус каждой удалённой станции. up=1 — онлайн, up=0 — нет ответа.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_ping")
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["name", "ip"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["name", "ip", "up", "rtt_ms"])

panels.title: История подключений станций
panels.description: Зелёный = станция отвечает. Серый = нет ответа. Виден точный момент включения/отключения.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_ping" and r._field == "up")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: if exists r._value then r._value else 0}))

from(bucket: "keenetic")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_ping" and r._field == "rtt_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
